prompt: Sophisticated minimal typographic logo on black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. The entire wordmark is in white with a subtle design detail: a single thin horizontal cyan line (#00E3FF) runs through the middle of all the letters, like a strike-through or horizon line, creating a unique visual signature. The typeface is medium-weight geometric sans-serif — not too bold, not too thin — balanced and contemporary. Clean wide letter-spacing. The period at the end is solid cyan. No icon, no symbol beyond the strike-through line detail. The overall effect is sleek, distinctive, and memorable while remaining purely typographic. Vector sharp, flat design, centered on pure black canvas. Professional brand identity.
